summary: Identified the bypass mechanism: Gate is called once (00:00:16 rejects 0.6286), but code path branches after first rejection. 47 sub-0.60 trades opened over ~10 hours with zero subsequent check_entry_gates logs, suggesting gate is bypassed or not reinvoked in trade loop.

answer_mechanics.observation_1: Gate called and working at 00:00:16 for mlb-tex-lad-2026-04-11 (conf=0.6286) - REJECTED as confidence_too_low
answer_mechanics.observation_2: By 00:01:14, model_bridge reports slug_already_open for tex-lad (someone opened it between 00:00:16 rejection and 00:01:14)
answer_mechanics.observation_3: Zero BRIDGE OPEN log entries for trades 241-244 despite source='model_bridge' in database
answer_mechanics.observation_4: Only ONE check_entry_gates rejection logged post-restart (00:00:16)
answer_mechanics.observation_5: 47 trades created between 00:00:29 and ~02:00 with confidence < 0.60
answer_mechanics.observation_6: Bot process ran for ~10 hours after restart (23:59:18 to 10:57:33 next day) without restarting

root_cause_hypothesis.primary: Gate check called ONE TIME per loop iteration, not for each intent
mechanism: Line 632-642: check_entry_gates() called ONCE with first intent signal
Line 643-651: If gate fails, logs rejection and continues to NEXT intent
But if gate PASSES, line 652-658: open_position() executes
CRITICAL: check_entry_gates may not be called for subsequent intents in same loop iteration
root_cause_hypothesis.evidence: Only one check_entry_gates call logged at 00:00:16 for entire 10-hour period
root_cause_hypothesis.implication: Subsequent intents (241-244) may bypass check_entry_gates entirely if they come in same loop or different code path

expected_flow: if gate_passes: open_position()  (must pass gate first)
code_path_analysis.observed_behavior: Gate called once, but 47 low-confidence trades open without gate rejection logs
code_path_analysis.gap: Either gate not being called for all intents, or alternative open_position path exists

concurrent_process_evidence.observation: Bot ran without restart for 10+ hours after patch, yet only ONE gate rejection in logs

database_evidence.critical_absence: ZERO matching BRIDGE OPEN log entries for any of these trade IDs

model_bridge_logs.00_01_14_observation: core.model_bridge: BRIDGE GATE REJECT [open_position] slug=mlb-tex-lad-2026-04-11 reason=slug_already_open
model_bridge_logs.implication: tex-lad was opened DESPITE being rejected by check_entry_gates 58 seconds earlier

probable_root_cause: Check if open_position() can be called without going through check_entry_gates(). Current code appears to have the gate check in correct position (line 632 before 652), but observed behavior shows trades opening without gate rejection logs. Possibilities: (1) Different code path in open_position or insert_open_trade that bypasses gate, (2) Gate check not being applied to all intents in loop, (3) Multiple intent processing paths with different gate enforcement
critical_concern: The confidence gate fix appears syntactically correct on disk but is NOT being enforced at runtime for 47 trades. This suggests either: (a) Running code differs from on-disk code, (b) Alternative open_position paths exist, or (c) Gate is conditionally applied
